metadata.description: Acceptance Test Driven Development methodology plugin for Claude Code, inspired by Uncle Bob's approach

plugins.name: atdd
plugins.description: Acceptance Test Driven Development for Claude Code. Enforces the ATDD methodology: write Given/When/Then specs first, generate a project-specific test pipeline, maintain two test streams (acceptance + unit). Inspired by Robert C. Martin's acceptance test approach from empire-2025.

plugins.name: engineer
plugins.description: Disciplined Agentic Engineering (DAE) — methodology kit for Claude Code. Skills that implement the DAE pipeline: feature intake, AC discovery, spec writing, planning, implementation, verification, hardening.
